components.value: V, S, M (the knucklebone of a dire animal)

area.value: 1 creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 feet apart

description.value: The bones of your targets’ joints grow thick and sharp, protruding painfully through the skin at the knuckles, elbows, shoulders, spine, and knees. The targets each gain a +1 bonus to natural armor and a +2 bonus on damage rolls with natural weapons, and they are treated as having armor spikes, with which they are proficient.
